introSection: Sky Wheel is a steel roller coaster located at Skyline Park in Bad Wörishofen, Bavaria, Germany. The cars are not the traditional type of car. The car is an X-Seat. These cars enable riders to go upside down without needing over-the-shoulder restraints.
fullText: Sky Wheel is a steel roller coaster located at Skyline Park in Bad Wörishofen, Bavaria, Germany. The cars are not the traditional type of car. The car is an X-Seat. These cars enable riders to go upside down without needing over-the-shoulder restraints.
